meta.description: Compressed hunt cards for bridge — one-line detection rules for bulk scanning
meta.usage: Load cards into context. For each card, grep target code for card.grep. On hit: execute card.check steps directly, use validWhen/invalidWhen/impact for rapid triage, and only read full DB entry (card.ref + card.lines) for confirmed true/likely positives.

cards.title: 1. Gateway Validation Bypass
cards.detect: The `execute()` function in `AxelarExecutable` calls `_execute()` which is overridden by the child contract.
check: VERIFY: Signal 1: Critical input parameter not validated against expected range or format; Signal 2: Oracle data consumed without staleness check or sanity...
PROVE: Attacker identifies a receiver that doesn't validate via the gateway; Attacker calls execute() with forged commandId, sourceChain, sourceAddress, payload
FALSIFY: Not this bug when: Validation exists but is in an upstream function caller; Safe if: Parameter range is inherently bounded by the type or protocol invariant
ANTIPATTERN: No gateway validation — anyone can call execute
cards.antipattern: No gateway validation — anyone can call execute
cards.validWhen: Signal 1: Critical input parameter not validated against expected range or format; Signal 2: Oracle data consumed without staleness check or sanity bounds
cards.invalidWhen: Not this bug when: Validation exists but is in an upstream function caller; Safe if: Parameter range is inherently bounded by the type or protocol invariant

cards.title: 2. Source Chain & Address Spoofing
check: VERIFY: Accepts from any source chain/address
FALSIFY: Allowlist with proper string handling
cards.antipattern: Accepts from any source chain/address
cards.validWhen: Accepts from any source chain/address

cards.title: 3. Token Burn-but-Call-Fails
cards.detect: Revert after token burn on source = fund loss
check: VERIFY: Revert after token burn on source = fund loss
FALSIFY: Handle all failures gracefully
cards.antipattern: Revert after token burn on source = fund loss
cards.validWhen: Revert after token burn on source = fund loss

cards.title: 4. Express Execution Front-Running
cards.detect: No check if express already processed
check: VERIFY: No check if express already processed
FALSIFY: ExpressExecutable handles express vs standard coordination
cards.antipattern: No check if express already processed
cards.securePattern: ExpressExecutable handles express vs standard coordination
cards.validWhen: No check if express already processed
cards.invalidWhen: ExpressExecutable handles express vs standard coordination

cards.title: 5. ITS Token Manager Misconfiguration
check: VERIFY: Lock-Unlock TokenManager on non-origin chains
FALSIFY: Mint-Burn on remote chains + flow limits
cards.antipattern: Lock-Unlock TokenManager on non-origin chains
cards.securePattern: Mint-Burn on remote chains + flow limits
cards.validWhen: Lock-Unlock TokenManager on non-origin chains
cards.invalidWhen: Mint-Burn on remote chains + flow limits

cards.title: 6. Gas Service Payment Issues
cards.detect: Message sent without gas payment — stuck forever
check: VERIFY: Message sent without gas payment — stuck forever
PROVE: Hardcoded gas doesn't account for destination chain costs
FALSIFY: Estimate gas based on destination and payload
cards.antipattern: Hardcoded gas doesn't account for destination chain costs
cards.securePattern: Estimate gas based on destination and payload
cards.validWhen: Message sent without gas payment — stuck forever
cards.invalidWhen: Estimate gas based on destination and payload

cards.title: 7. String-Based Chain Matching
check: VERIFY: Different representations of same chain
FALSIFY: Store and compare using Axelar's exact chain IDs
cards.antipattern: Different representations of same chain
cards.securePattern: Store and compare using Axelar's exact chain IDs
cards.validWhen: Different representations of same chain
cards.invalidWhen: Store and compare using Axelar's exact chain IDs

cards.title: 8. Executable Contract Reentrancy
check: VERIFY: Reentrancy in _executeWithToken
FALSIFY: Checks-Effects-Interactions + ReentrancyGuard
cards.antipattern: Reentrancy in _executeWithToken
cards.validWhen: Reentrancy in _executeWithToken

cards.title: 9. Governance Proposal Replay
cards.detect: No tracking of executed governance commands
check: VERIFY: No tracking of executed governance commands
FALSIFY: Track all executed governance commands
cards.antipattern: No tracking of executed governance commands
cards.validWhen: No tracking of executed governance commands

cards.title: 10. Command ID Collision
cards.detect: Same commandId space for different message types
check: VERIFY: Same commandId space for different message types
FALSIFY: Separate tracking per message type
cards.antipattern: Same commandId space for different message types
cards.validWhen: Same commandId space for different message types

cards.title: 1. Router Message Validation
cards.detect: Contracts implementing `IAny2EVMMessageReceiver` expose `ccipReceive()` as a public/external function but omit the...
check: VERIFY: Signal 1: Critical input parameter not validated against expected range or format; Signal 2: Oracle data consumed without staleness check or sanity...
PROVE: Attacker identifies a CCIP receiver without router validation; Attacker calls ccipReceive() directly with forged Client.Any2EVMMessage
FALSIFY: Not this bug when: Validation exists but is in an upstream function caller; Safe if: Parameter range is inherently bounded by the type or protocol invariant
ANTIPATTERN: Router address can be changed to attacker-controlled contract
cards.antipattern: Router address can be changed to attacker-controlled contract
cards.validWhen: Signal 1: Critical input parameter not validated against expected range or format; Signal 2: Oracle data consumed without staleness check or sanity bounds
cards.invalidWhen: Not this bug when: Validation exists but is in an upstream function caller; Safe if: Parameter range is inherently bounded by the type or protocol invariant

cards.title: 2. Fee Estimation Errors
cards.detect: Hardcoded fee doesn't track actual CCIP costs
check: VERIFY: Hardcoded fee doesn't track actual CCIP costs
FALSIFY: Quote fee and validate payment
cards.antipattern: Hardcoded fee doesn't track actual CCIP costs
cards.validWhen: Hardcoded fee doesn't track actual CCIP costs

cards.title: 3. Token Pool Configuration
cards.detect: No tracking of locked vs released amounts
check: VERIFY: No tracking of locked vs released amounts
FALSIFY: Rate-limited pool with supply tracking
cards.antipattern: No tracking of locked vs released amounts
cards.validWhen: No tracking of locked vs released amounts

cards.title: 4. Extra Args & Gas Limit Misconfiguration
check: VERIFY: Empty extraArgs defaults to 200k gas
PROVE: Using V1 when V2 is needed (missing strict sequencing control)
FALSIFY: Right gas limit with V2 extra args
cards.antipattern: Using V1 when V2 is needed (missing strict sequencing control)
cards.securePattern: Right gas limit with V2 extra args
cards.validWhen: Empty extraArgs defaults to 200k gas
cards.invalidWhen: Right gas limit with V2 extra args

cards.title: 5. Lane Allowlist Bypass
check: VERIFY: Accepts messages from ANY chain
PROVE: Accepts from any sender on allowed chain
FALSIFY: Validate both chain and sender
cards.antipattern: Accepts from any sender on allowed chain
cards.validWhen: Accepts messages from ANY chain

cards.title: 6. Manual Execution Replay
cards.detect: Same message can be manually executed multiple times
check: VERIFY: Same message can be manually executed multiple times
FALSIFY: Idempotent message processing
cards.antipattern: Same message can be manually executed multiple times
cards.validWhen: Same message can be manually executed multiple times

cards.title: 7. Sender & Receiver Validation
check: VERIFY: Incorrect sender decoding
PROVE: Sending tokens + data to receiver that can't handle both
FALSIFY: Validate sender format and content
cards.antipattern: Sending tokens + data to receiver that can't handle both
cards.validWhen: Incorrect sender decoding

cards.title: 8. Rate Limiter Griefing
cards.detect: Global rate limit shared by all users
check: VERIFY: Global rate limit shared by all users
FALSIFY: Tiered rate limiting
cards.antipattern: Global rate limit shared by all users
cards.validWhen: Global rate limit shared by all users

cards.title: 9. Off-Ramp Processing Failures
cards.detect: Revert causes tokens to be stuck in receiver contract
check: VERIFY: Revert causes tokens to be stuck in receiver contract
FALSIFY: Never revert, store failed messages for recovery
cards.antipattern: Revert causes tokens to be stuck in receiver contract
cards.securePattern: Never revert, store failed messages for recovery
cards.validWhen: Revert causes tokens to be stuck in receiver contract
cards.invalidWhen: Never revert, store failed messages for recovery

cards.title: 10. Token Amount Validation
check: VERIFY: Trusts message.data instead of actual tokenAmounts
FALSIFY: Validate against actual received tokens
cards.antipattern: Trusts message.data instead of actual tokenAmounts
cards.validWhen: Trusts message.data instead of actual tokenAmounts

cards.title: 11. Message Size Limit Violations
cards.detect: No size check on dynamically built payload
check: VERIFY: No size check on dynamically built payload
FALSIFY: Check size before sending
cards.antipattern: No size check on dynamically built payload
cards.validWhen: No size check on dynamically built payload

cards.title: 12. Self-Service Token Registration Issues
cards.detect: Lock-release pool on BOTH chains means no burn/mint
check: VERIFY: Lock-release pool on BOTH chains means no burn/mint
PROVE: No flow limit means entire supply can migrate to one chain
FALSIFY: Correct pool type per chain
cards.antipattern: No flow limit means entire supply can migrate to one chain
cards.validWhen: Lock-release pool on BOTH chains means no burn/mint

cards.title: 1. Cross-Chain Replay Attacks
cards.detect: Bridge messages or signatures don't include sufficient context (chain ID, contract address, nonce) to prevent replay...
check: VERIFY: Signal 1: Critical input parameter not validated against expected range or format; Signal 2: Oracle data consumed without staleness check or sanity...
PROVE: *Scenario 1: Cross-Chain Signature Replay; User signs message to bridge tokens on Chain A
FALSIFY: Not this bug when: Validation exists but is in an upstream function caller; Safe if: Parameter range is inherently bounded by the type or protocol invariant
IMPACT: Double Minting: Tokens minted multiple times for single deposit
cards.antipattern: No contract address in replay protection
cards.validWhen: Signal 1: Critical input parameter not validated against expected range or format; Signal 2: Oracle data consumed without staleness check or sanity bounds
cards.invalidWhen: Not this bug when: Validation exists but is in an upstream function caller; Safe if: Parameter range is inherently bounded by the type or protocol invariant
cards.impact: Double Minting: Tokens minted multiple times for single deposit

cards.title: 2. Signature Validation Issues
check: VERIFY: No signature length validation
FALSIFY: Proper signature validation
cards.antipattern: No signature length validation
cards.validWhen: No signature length validation

cards.title: 3. Token Bridging Issues
check: VERIFY: Doesn't account for transfer fees
FALSIFY: Handle fee-on-transfer tokens
cards.antipattern: Doesn't account for transfer fees
cards.validWhen: Doesn't account for transfer fees

cards.title: 4. Sequencer & L2 Specific Issues
check: VERIFY: Blocked when sequencer down
FALSIFY: Account for sequencer downtime
cards.antipattern: Blocked when sequencer down
cards.validWhen: Blocked when sequencer down

cards.title: 5. Access Control Vulnerabilities
check: VERIFY: Approval persists after bridging
FALSIFY: Clear approvals and use salt
cards.antipattern: Approval persists after bridging
cards.validWhen: Approval persists after bridging

cards.title: 6. Slippage & MEV Issues
check: VERIFY: Price can change during bridge delay
FALSIFY: Slippage protection and deadlines
cards.antipattern: Price can change during bridge delay
cards.validWhen: Price can change during bridge delay

cards.title: 7. Message Ordering & Timing
check: VERIFY: Assumes message order
FALSIFY: State machine handles any order
cards.antipattern: Assumes message order
cards.validWhen: Assumes message order

cards.title: Vulnerability Description
cards.detect: Three variations of missing validation in bridge verification:
check: VERIFY: Three variations of missing validation in bridge verification
PROVE: *Path A: Zero-Hash Trusted Root — Message Proof Bypass (Nomad — $190M) [CRITICAL]; Find a legitimate past bridge transaction (e.g., 100 WBTC transfer from Moonbeam →...
ANTIPATTERN: address(0) whitelisted + no msg.value validation for native deposits
cards.antipattern: address(0) whitelisted + no msg.value validation for native deposits
cards.validWhen: Three variations of missing validation in bridge verification

cards.title: High-Signal Grep Seeds
check: VERIFY: resourceIDToTokenContractAddress
cards.validWhen: resourceIDToTokenContractAddress

cards.title: Vulnerability Description
cards.detect: Three vulnerabilities exploiting identity assumptions in cross-chain and cross-contract contexts:
check: VERIFY: Three vulnerabilities exploiting identity assumptions in cross-chain and cross-contract contexts
PROVE: *Path A: Cross-Chain Address Collision via CREATE Nonce Replay (Optimism/Wintermute — $15M) [CRITICAL]; Wintermute receives 20M OP tokens on Optimism to their L1 Gnosis...
ANTIPATTERN: sweepToken guard checks current address only — legacy proxy bypasses it
cards.antipattern: sweepToken guard checks current address only — legacy proxy bypasses it
cards.validWhen: Three vulnerabilities exploiting identity assumptions in cross-chain and cross-contract contexts

cards.title: High-Signal Grep Seeds
check: VERIFY: High-Signal Grep Seeds
cards.validWhen: High-Signal Grep Seeds

cards.title: Vulnerability Description
cards.detect: Two distinct access-control failures in bridge architectures:
check: VERIFY: Two distinct access-control failures in bridge architectures
PROVE: *Path A: Cross-Chain Validator Key Replacement (Poly Network — $611M) [CRITICAL]; Analyze EthCrossChainManager — discover it has no target whitelist for...
ANTIPATTERN: Signature hash does not include chainId or contract address
cards.antipattern: Signature hash does not include chainId or contract address
cards.validWhen: Two distinct access-control failures in bridge architectures

cards.title: High-Signal Grep Seeds
check: VERIFY: verifyHeaderAndExecuteTx
cards.validWhen: verifyHeaderAndExecuteTx

cards.title: Vulnerable Pattern Examples
check: VERIFY: Example 1: Missing ISM Configuration [MEDIUM]
ANTIPATTERN: Always returns true
cards.antipattern: Always returns true
cards.validWhen: Example 1: Missing ISM Configuration [MEDIUM]

cards.title: 2. Message Replay Attacks
cards.detect: When message processing fails (reverts), the protocol may not mark the message as consumed.
check: VERIFY: When message processing fails (reverts), the protocol may not mark the message as consumed.
PROVE: Attacker initiates cross-chain token transfer; On destination, message processing partially succeeds but then reverts
FALSIFY: Mark processed before state changes
ANTIPATTERN: State changed before potential revert
cards.antipattern: State changed before potential revert
cards.validWhen: When message processing fails (reverts), the protocol may not mark the message as consumed.

cards.title: 3. Router Configuration Issues
check: VERIFY: Wrong address format comparison
FALSIFY: Proper router enrollment and validation
cards.antipattern: Wrong address format comparison
cards.validWhen: Wrong address format comparison

cards.title: 4. Handle Function Vulnerabilities
check: VERIFY: State change after external call
FALSIFY: Proper access control and reentrancy protection
cards.antipattern: State change after external call
cards.securePattern: Proper access control and reentrancy protection
cards.validWhen: State change after external call
cards.invalidWhen: Proper access control and reentrancy protection

cards.title: 5. Gas Payment Issues
check: VERIFY: Hardcoded gas may be insufficient
FALSIFY: Dynamic gas based on message
cards.antipattern: Hardcoded gas may be insufficient
cards.validWhen: Hardcoded gas may be insufficient

cards.title: Vulnerable Pattern Examples
cards.detect: Inherits LzApp directly without non-blocking wrapper
check: VERIFY: Inherits LzApp directly without non-blocking wrapper
cards.antipattern: Inherits LzApp directly without non-blocking wrapper
cards.validWhen: Inherits LzApp directly without non-blocking wrapper

cards.title: 3. Gas Estimation & Fee Calculation
cards.detect: Uses source chain gas config for destination
check: VERIFY: Uses source chain gas config for destination
PROVE: Fee estimation uses different payload than actual send
FALSIFY: Use actual payload for estimation
cards.antipattern: Fee estimation uses different payload than actual send
cards.validWhen: Uses source chain gas config for destination

cards.title: 4. Fee Refund Handling
check: VERIFY: Contract cannot receive refunds
PROVE: Refunds go to contract, not user
FALSIFY: Contract can receive ETH refunds
cards.antipattern: Refunds go to contract, not user
cards.validWhen: Contract cannot receive refunds

cards.title: 5. Payload Size & Address Validation
check: VERIFY: No limit on _toAddress length
FALSIFY: Validate address length
cards.antipattern: No limit on _toAddress length
cards.validWhen: No limit on _toAddress length

cards.title: 6. Composed Message Vulnerabilities (LayerZero V2)
cards.detect: Composed messages introduce dual-transaction patterns where the initial receive and subsequent compose execution are...
check: VERIFY: Composed messages introduce dual-transaction patterns where the initial receive and subsequent compose execution are separate transactions.
PROVE: Rejects compose when user sends with compose option
FALSIFY: Prevent users from sending with compose if not supported
cards.antipattern: Rejects compose when user sends with compose option
cards.securePattern: Prevent users from sending with compose if not supported
cards.validWhen: Composed messages introduce dual-transaction patterns where the initial receive and subsequent compose execution are separate transactions.
cards.invalidWhen: Prevent users from sending with compose if not supported

cards.title: 7. OFT/ONFT Specific Vulnerabilities
cards.detect: Doesn't account for different decimals on chains
check: VERIFY: Doesn't account for different decimals on chains
PROVE: Event building after _creditTill can run out of gas
FALSIFY: Assert no ZRO fee when paying in native
cards.antipattern: Event building after _creditTill can run out of gas
cards.securePattern: Assert no ZRO fee when paying in native
cards.validWhen: Doesn't account for different decimals on chains
cards.invalidWhen: Assert no ZRO fee when paying in native

cards.title: 8. Peer & Trust Configuration Vulnerabilities
cards.detect: Uses sender address if peer not configured
check: VERIFY: Uses sender address if peer not configured
FALSIFY: Validate peer chain is different
cards.antipattern: Uses sender address if peer not configured
cards.validWhen: Uses sender address if peer not configured

cards.title: 9. Stargate/sgReceive Integration Vulnerabilities
cards.detect: Complex operations can run out of gas
check: VERIFY: Complex operations can run out of gas
PROVE: Sends to msg.sender instead of destination contract
FALSIFY: Explicit gas limit ensures catch block executes
cards.antipattern: Sends to msg.sender instead of destination contract
cards.securePattern: Explicit gas limit ensures catch block executes
cards.validWhen: Complex operations can run out of gas
cards.invalidWhen: Explicit gas limit ensures catch block executes

cards.title: 10. Cross-Chain Payload Validation Vulnerabilities
check: VERIFY: tapSendData.tapOftAddress not validated
PROVE: Debits from msg.sender instead of 'from'
FALSIFY: Validate tapOftAddress is the expected token
cards.antipattern: Debits from msg.sender instead of 'from'
cards.securePattern: Validate tapOftAddress is the expected token
cards.validWhen: tapSendData.tapOftAddress not validated
cards.invalidWhen: Validate tapOftAddress is the expected token

cards.title: 11. Insufficient Gas Limit Calculation
cards.detect: 20k gas per token is insufficient for minting
check: VERIFY: 20k gas per token is insufficient for minting
PROVE: MIN_FALLBACK_RESERVE doesn't cover all overhead
FALSIFY: Let users specify higher gas if needed
cards.antipattern: MIN_FALLBACK_RESERVE doesn't cover all overhead
cards.securePattern: Let users specify higher gas if needed
cards.validWhen: 20k gas per token is insufficient for minting
cards.invalidWhen: Let users specify higher gas if needed

cards.title: 1. sgReceive Out-of-Gas
cards.detect: Complex multi-step logic can run out of gas
check: VERIFY: Signal 1: Critical input parameter not validated against expected range or format; Signal 2: Oracle data consumed without staleness check or sanity...
PROVE: Complex multi-step logic can run out of gas
FALSIFY: Not this bug when: Validation exists but is in an upstream function caller; Safe if: Parameter range is inherently bounded by the type or protocol invariant
cards.antipattern: Complex multi-step logic can run out of gas
cards.securePattern: Reserve gas for catch block + token recovery
cards.validWhen: Signal 1: Critical input parameter not validated against expected range or format; Signal 2: Oracle data consumed without staleness check or sanity bounds
cards.invalidWhen: Not this bug when: Validation exists but is in an upstream function caller; Safe if: Parameter range is inherently bounded by the type or protocol invariant

cards.title: 2. Router Swap Slippage
check: VERIFY: Zero slippage protection — sandwich attackable
FALSIFY: Slippage in shared decimals + user-configurable
cards.antipattern: Zero slippage protection — sandwich attackable
cards.validWhen: Zero slippage protection — sandwich attackable

cards.title: 3. Pool Credit Imbalance
cards.detect: No credit check before swap — reverts confusingly
check: VERIFY: No credit check before swap — reverts confusingly
FALSIFY: Check available liquidity before swap
cards.antipattern: No credit check before swap — reverts confusingly
cards.validWhen: No credit check before swap — reverts confusingly

cards.title: 4. Stargate V2 Compose Failures
check: VERIFY: No error handling in lzCompose
FALSIFY: Always handle compose failures gracefully
cards.antipattern: No error handling in lzCompose
cards.validWhen: No error handling in lzCompose

cards.title: 5. dstGasForCall Misconfiguration
check: VERIFY: dstGasForCall = 0 uses default 200k gas
FALSIFY: Gas tailored to destination operation
cards.antipattern: dstGasForCall = 0 uses default 200k gas
cards.validWhen: dstGasForCall = 0 uses default 200k gas

cards.title: 6. Destination Address Mismatch
check: VERIFY: Destination set to msg.
PROVE: Destination set to msg.sender instead of helper contract
FALSIFY: Send to destination helper contract
cards.antipattern: Destination set to msg.sender instead of helper contract
cards.validWhen: Destination set to msg.

cards.title: 7. Fee Layer Exploitation
cards.detect: quoteLayerZeroFee with different payload than actual swap
check: VERIFY: quoteLayerZeroFee with different payload than actual swap
FALSIFY: Quote with exact same parameters as swap
cards.antipattern: quoteLayerZeroFee with different payload than actual swap
cards.securePattern: Quote with exact same parameters as swap
cards.validWhen: quoteLayerZeroFee with different payload than actual swap
cards.invalidWhen: Quote with exact same parameters as swap

cards.title: 8. Amount Trimming & Decimal Dust
check: VERIFY: Dust stays in bridge contract
FALSIFY: Only take the normalizable amount from user
cards.antipattern: Dust stays in bridge contract
cards.securePattern: Only take the normalizable amount from user
cards.validWhen: Dust stays in bridge contract
cards.invalidWhen: Only take the normalizable amount from user

cards.title: Vulnerable Pattern Examples
check: VERIFY: Uses deprecated method
PROVE: Sequence tracking not per-emitter
cards.antipattern: Sequence tracking not per-emitter
cards.validWhen: Uses deprecated method

cards.title: 3. Message Replay Attacks
cards.detect: Same VAA can be replayed across instances
check: VERIFY: Same VAA can be replayed across instances
FALSIFY: Per-instance replay protection
cards.antipattern: Same VAA can be replayed across instances
cards.validWhen: Same VAA can be replayed across instances

cards.title: 4. Token Bridge Integration
check: VERIFY: Uses transferWithPayload incorrectly
FALSIFY: Correct Token Bridge usage
cards.antipattern: Uses transferWithPayload incorrectly
cards.validWhen: Uses transferWithPayload incorrectly

cards.title: 5. Gas Limit Issues
check: VERIFY: Gas limit cannot be updated
FALSIFY: Updatable gas configuration
cards.antipattern: Gas limit cannot be updated
cards.validWhen: Gas limit cannot be updated
